description: M2-extension Tool Registry fixture — adds SV-SESS-05 coverage (non-idempotent tool MUST be classified Destructive with default_control=Prompt per §12.2). Inherits all 8 tools from test-vectors/tool-registry/tools.json plus 2 new entries that specifically exercise the idempotency-classification rule.

tools.name: compliant_ephemeral_tool
tools.description: A tool that lacks dedupe support (idempotency_retention_seconds absent or < 3600). Per §12.2 MUST be classified Destructive + Prompt. Validators assert that impl's Tool Registry load-time check accepts this classification combination. Opposite test case: non_compliant_ephemeral_tool below, which the Runner MUST reject at load.

tools.name: non_compliant_ephemeral_tool
tools.description: A tool that lacks dedupe support but is INCORRECTLY classified as Mutating/AutoAllow. The Runner's Tool Registry load-time validator MUST REJECT this tool with ToolPoolStale reason=idempotency-retention-insufficient per §12.2. Validators assert rejection via startup-failure subprocess harness.
